title: Copilot Studio PAYGO Tagging Strategy
description: Required Azure resource tags for billing policy resource groups. These tags enable cost allocation, ownership tracking, and governance reporting in Azure Cost Management and Power BI.

CostCenter.description: Financial cost center code for charge-back and budget allocation. Must match the organization's chart of accounts.

Environment.description: Deployment stage of the Power Platform environment linked to this resource group.

BusinessUnit.description: Organizational business unit responsible for the Copilot Studio agents in the linked environment.

AgentOwner.description: Email address of the individual or team responsible for the agents in the linked environment. Used for alert routing and accountability.
